surprisingly good run

Excluding the Chapter 3 Any% PB that I got earlier today in one of the tournament qualifier races that happened, this is my first personal best speedrun with my new keyboard! While I'm still getting used to it, it feels great so far, and I'm sure that I'll be able to adjust to this fairly quickly within the next couple of weeks.

As for the run itself, it can definitely be improved upon, especially with around 5 or so seconds of mistakes, but it's still really good regardless. A 25:48-equivalent, even with 30 TBPS, is definitely not an easy task.
